name: Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend sugar and melted butter well.
2. Stir in beaten eggs and vanilla.
3. Sift and mix dry ingredients and add to butter mixture, blending well.
4. Chill the dough.
5. Turn onto a lightly floured board and roll to 1/8 inch thickness.
6. Cut with floured cutters.
7. Before baking, sprinkle colored sugar on top of the cookies. It sticks and there's no need for frosting unless desired.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
